title: Senior Financial Analyst - NSE - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - NSE - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
NSE is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Dhanbad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NSE:
NSE is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSE!
